golden_categories.name: Standard FQDN Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates fully qualified domain names (FQDN) under default settings.

golden_categories.name: Trailing Dot Option
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with the option to allow trailing dots.

golden_categories.name: Non-TLD Validation
golden_categories.description: Handles FQDN validation when the requirement for a top-level domain (TLD) is disabled.

golden_categories.name: Numeric TLD Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with numeric TLDs when the requirement for a TLD is disabled.

golden_categories.name: Wildcard Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with wildcard domains enabled.

golden_categories.name: Combined Options Validation
golden_categories.description: Validates FQDNs with multiple options enabled, including trailing dots, underscores, and numeric TLDs.

generated_categories.name: Default Validation Behavior
generated_categories.description: Tests the default behavior of the isFQDN validator without any options provided.

generated_categories.name: Domain Structure Options
generated_categories.description: Tests options that modify the structure of valid domain names, such as allowing domains without TLDs, underscores, trailing dots, numeric-only TLDs, and wildcard domains.

generated_categories.name: Length Validation Options
generated_categories.description: Tests options that ignore the maximum length validation for domain names.

golden_to_generated.reason: The generated category 'Default Validation Behavior' aligns directly with the golden category 'Standard FQDN Validation' as both focus on default FQDN validation without any options.

The generated category 'Domain Structure Options' includes validation for trailing dots, which overlaps with the golden category 'Trailing Dot Option'. However, it also includes other options not covered by GC-2.

The generated category 'Domain Structure Options' includes validation for domains without TLDs, which overlaps with the golden category 'Non-TLD Validation'. However, it also includes other options not covered by GC-3.

The generated category 'Domain Structure Options' includes validation for numeric TLDs when TLD requirement is disabled, which overlaps with the golden category 'Numeric TLD Validation'. However, it also includes other options not covered by GC-4.

The generated category 'Domain Structure Options' includes validation for wildcard domains, which overlaps with the golden category 'Wildcard Domain Validation'. However, it also includes other options not covered by GC-5.

The generated category 'Domain Structure Options' includes multiple options such as trailing dots, underscores, and numeric TLDs, which overlaps with the golden category 'Combined Options Validation'. However, it also includes other options not covered by GC-6.

generated_to_golden.reason: The generated category 'Default Validation Behavior' aligns directly with the golden category 'Standard FQDN Validation' as both focus on default FQDN validation without any options.

The generated category 'Domain Structure Options' spans multiple golden categories as it includes validation for trailing dots, domains without TLDs, numeric TLDs, wildcard domains, and combined options. However, it does not fully align with any single golden category.
The generated category 'Length Validation Options' focuses on ignoring maximum length validation, which is not covered by any golden category.

novel_generated_categories.reason: The generated category 'Length Validation Options' introduces a new behavior related to ignoring maximum length validation, which is not represented in the golden categories.
